intro: Schizachyrium semitectum, also known as Texas little bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America, characterized by its blue-green foliage and feathery panicles. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and improve overall immune function.
